switch.title: 一鍵及定時自動清理時運行文件歸類
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_auto_file_all=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_auto_file_all=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_file_all=0/clearbox_auto_file_all=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已開啟！" else sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_file_all=1/clearbox_auto_file_all=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已關閉！" fi

switch.title: 一鍵/定時自動清理時快速磁碟優化
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已開啟！" else sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已關閉！" fi

summary.sh: echo -n '當前設定大小：'; echo -n $(cat $work_dir/settings.prop | grep clearbox_clear_cache_size | cut -f2 -d '='); echo -n ' M'

param.name: put
param.desc: 請輸入新值[數字]：(單位：兆（M）. 範圍：100M)
param.label: 數字
